title: Labrador Unified_App — Prediction QA
subtitle: State → predict → interact → verify. Each scenario captures a frame before and after one interaction; the model predicts the result from the before frame and checks it against the after frame.

scenarios.title: Auto Fit, then zoom — the zoom must persist
scenarios.state: Scope page, side panel hidden (the Auto-Fit-stuck trigger condition). A fitted view: Y −20..20 V, X −6..6 ms.
scenarios.interaction: Click Auto Fit, then wheel-zoom in 8 notches over the plot at 30% / 40%.
scenarios.prediction: The manual zoom persists: the after frame shows a narrower, off-centre axis range, not the symmetric fit. (If Auto Fit were still stuck, the view would re-fit every frame and the after frame would match the before frame exactly.)
scenarios.actual: Y top moved 20 V → ~12 V (range ~12..−20 V) and a mouse-position readout appeared; the view did NOT snap back to the fit.
scenarios.note: Behaviourally confirms the Auto Fit one-shot fix (commit 3ba0e78).

scenarios.title: Theme switch — Classic Dark → Amber Retro
scenarios.state: Scope page, Classic Dark theme (neutral grey chrome).
scenarios.prediction: The whole UI recolours to amber-on-black with the CRT bezel and segment frames of the retro theme; layout unchanged.
scenarios.actual: UI is amber-on-black with the CRT bezel present. (A board also connected mid-run — live traces + ‘Connected — firmware 12.3’ — incidental to the theme change.)
scenarios.note: Theme applied cleanly; no layout shift or unstyled chrome.

scenarios.title: Side-panel navigation — Scope → Signals
scenarios.state: Scope page with the side panel visible.
scenarios.prediction: The side panel switches to the Signals page: Signal Generator 1 & 2 with Sine Wave Properties and Digital Outputs.
scenarios.actual: Signals panel shown with SG1/SG2 sine controls and Digital Outputs; ‘Vpeak-peak’ label renders in full (label-width fix holding).
scenarios.note: Navigation correct; no truncation at this font scale.
